title: lathyrus cicera f. angustifolius
intro: Lathyrus cicera f. angustifolius, also known as narrow-leaved chickling vetch, is a plant species within the legume family, commonly used for its medicinal properties and nutritional benefits. It is reported to possess diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects. Additionally, Lathyrus cicera f. angustifolius seeds are a rich source of protein and are used as a nutritious food supplement, particularly in traditional and organic farming practices.
